verifications.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch — VERIFIED FIXED. FACTION_SCORE_START=20 in merlin_constants.gd:1143. All callers (reputation_system, save_system, store, effect_engine) use MerlinConstants.FACTION_SCORE_START correctly.
Deterministic minigame selection — VERIFIED FIXED. pick_minigame_for_field() at merlin_effect_engine.gd:806 uses randi() % minigames.size() (random). No field.hash() determinism remains.

overall_assessment: All creator-requested deletions applied. 10 dead files removed (~1850 lines). Zero known bugs. Codebase clean for feature development. 16 total bugs fixed across 5 cycles.
